- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Real estate website with Next.js, React, and MySQL
  - Professional modern design with admin panel
  - Features: Property listings, 3D tours, EMI calculator, neighborhood insights, scheduling

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created frontend (Next.js), backend (Express), and database (MySQL) directories
  - Set up project structure with all necessary files

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Created complete backend API with 7 route modules (auth, properties, inquiries, visits, emi, admin, neighborhood)
  - Built frontend with pages, components, and utilities
  - Implemented database schema with all required tables
  - Added authentication, property management, inquiries, visits, EMI calculator
  - Created admin panel with statistics, property management, inquiry management

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
  - Review if extensions needed for development

- [ ] Compile the Project
  - Install dependencies for both frontend and backend
  - Run diagnostics and resolve any issues

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  - Create tasks.json for development servers

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - Start MySQL server
  - Start backend server (npm run dev)
  - Start frontend server (npm run dev)

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with full setup instructions
  - API documentation included
  - Feature list comprehensive
